slides.title: The cancer you can *see coming*.
slides.sub: Skin cancer is the most common cancer, and one of the most survivable when it is caught early. Here is how.

slides.title: Catch it while it's thin
slides.body: Melanoma is highly treatable when found early. The thinner it is at diagnosis, the *better the odds* tend to be.

slides.title: Learn your ABCDEs
slides.body: Asymmetry, irregular Borders, uneven Color, a Diameter over a pencil eraser, and any spot that is *Evolving* over time.

slides.title: Check your own skin
slides.body: A monthly look, mirrors included, helps you notice change. A new or changing spot *is worth* a closer look.

slides.title: See a dermatologist yearly
slides.body: An annual skin exam can spot what you miss, including the back and scalp. Higher-risk skin *may need* it more often.

slides.title: Early beats everything
slides.body: Most skin cancers are curable when caught early. Sun protection and screening together *can lower* your long-term risk.

slides.title: Make the check a *habit*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your sun protection, movement and other daily habits in one place, so the routines that protect you stay on your radar.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Skin cancer is the most common cancer, and also one of the most survivable when you catch it early. 🌿

Learn the ABCDE rule, check your own skin monthly, and book a yearly dermatologist exam. Caught thin, melanoma is highly treatable. Save this. 🔖
